hero.subtitle: Track your Instagram, TikTok, and Twitter data. Identify the posts that convert. Scale your acquisition with data, not gut feeling.

painSection.title: Why your acquisition is stalling.

cards.title: No tracking, or a Google Sheet filled in by hand.
cards.description: Your Instagram, TikTok, Twitter stats — you jot them down by hand in a spreadsheet when you have time. You steer by gut feeling, not by data.

cards.title: You don't know what actually converts.
cards.description: Your last 40 posts of the month — you can't rank them best to worst by fans brought in. You redo the same hooks at random.

cards.title: Your A/B testing is nonexistent, or half-done.
cards.description: To compare two hooks, you have to compile the data by hand across three platforms. Most people give up. Nobody really optimizes.

cards.title: You don't know where your funnel leaks.
cards.description: Between the view, the click, the contact, the sale: you inevitably lose fans at every step. But you don't know where, how many, or why.

painSection.bridgeText:
The result: your acquisition is stalling. Without data, without a visible funnel, without A/B testing,
you can't optimize what you don't measure.

pivot.line1: The real problem isn't your content.
pivot.line2: It's that you can't see what works.
pivot.supportText:
You want to scale your acquisition, but you're not making the right decisions
because you can't see your data.

solution.introTitle: Here's how your acquisition is going to run.

items.title: All your acquisition accounts, scraped automatically every day.
items.description: Connect all your accounts by model, by network. The scraping runs automatically, updated every morning. You see all your data in a single dashboard. No more three apps running in parallel.

bullets.label: Multi-account per model
bullets.text: : each creator can have multiple accounts per network

bullets.label: Daily auto-scraping
bullets.text: : Instagram, TikTok, Twitter refreshed every morning

bullets.label: A single dashboard
bullets.text: : no more 12 tabs open between native apps

items.title: Your post calendar and your tasks, shared with your team.
items.description: Create the posts to publish, assign tasks to your managers or your creators. Everyone sees what's to be done, what's done, what's late. Automatic notifications so nothing slips through.

bullets.label: Shared calendar
bullets.text: : scheduled posts and tasks in a single view

bullets.label: Assignment per member
bullets.text: : you know who does what, without chasing anyone

bullets.label: Auto notifications
bullets.text: : each member is notified on Telegram or Discord

items.title: Every post of every account, with all its stats.
items.description: Auto-scraping of all your published posts. Views, likes, saves, retweets, engagement rate: it's all there. Sort by account, by period, by performance, and identify the winning patterns.

bullets.label: Multi-criteria sorting
bullets.text: : by account, by period, by performance, by model

bullets.label: Winning patterns
bullets.text: : the hooks that keep coming back in your posts that blow up

items.title: The analysis of every account and every network.
items.description: Which account performs, which one drops off. Which network brings you the most fans. Which format converts best. Every question you're asking yourself has a number-backed answer.

bullets.label: Performance per account
bullets.text: : who's scaling, who's stalling, who's dropping

bullets.label: Performance per network
bullets.text: : TikTok vs IG vs X, ROI per channel

bullets.label: Data you can visualize fast
bullets.text: : every metric collected to calculate your conversion rate and build a perfect pre-funnel

items.title: Tracking links to know where your fans really come from.
items.description: Create tracking links per bio or per campaign. You see exactly which link generated which fan, and how much revenue. Never any mystery on attribution again: you double down on what works, you cut what doesn't.

bullets.label: Full attribution
bullets.text: : which link → which fan → how much revenue

bullets.label: No more mystery
bullets.text: : you know where every dollar of revenue comes from.

items.title: The complete funnel of your accounts: from view to sale.
items.description: How many views on that TikTok. How many clicks afterwards on your bio. How many landed on your contact point. How many bought. Every step is measured. Every drop-off is visible.

bullets.label: Conversion rate per step
bullets.text: : you see exactly where it drops off

bullets.label: Comparison per campaign
bullets.text: : which funnel performs, which one needs fixing

cards.name: Luca
cards.beforeQuote: "i was posting on several accounts without really knowing which one performed. i was looking at Instagram Insights by hand but i couldn't reach any clear conclusion. now i see right away which content converted and on which account. i'd have saved a lot of time if i'd had it before"

cards.name: MaxaM
cards.beforeQuote: "before, i didn't know where my fans came from. i was making content kind of at random and i had no clean data. now with the tracking links i know which post brought who. i stopped wasting time on what wasn't working and my results show it"

faq.title: Your questions, our answers.
faq.subtitle: Everything we tell you here, we stand behind.

items.question: How do I connect my Instagram, TikTok, and Twitter accounts?
items.answer: You just enter the @username of your public accounts in the dashboard. No credentials to hand over, no OAuth to validate, no app to connect. The scraping runs on the public pages of each network, like an intelligent crawler that monitors and collects the data for you.

items.question: How often is the scraping updated?
items.answer: Once a day, at the time you choose. You set the update time yourself from your account settings — for example every morning at 8am. You find the new data of your accounts (views, likes, comments, saves, shares) refreshed at the chosen time in your dashboard. The daily rhythm is more than enough to steer your content strategy.

items.question: How many accounts can I connect per model?
items.answer: The Growth Marketing plan includes 2 Instagram accounts + 2 Twitter accounts + 2 TikTok accounts per model. If your models have more accounts, you can add add-ons: +5€/month for a Twitter account, +10€/month for an Instagram account, +17€/month for a TikTok account.

items.question: How does automated A/B testing work?
items.answer: You publish several versions of the same post (different hooks, thumbnails, captions) on your accounts. SyncAgency tracks the performance of each one in parallel: views, engagement rate, clicks on your bio, fans brought in. You get a clear comparison within a few days, without compiling a spreadsheet by hand.

items.question: How many tracking links can I create?
items.answer: Unlimited tracking links on the Growth Marketing and Empire OS plans. Create a link per post, per bio, per campaign, per story, with no limit at all. Each link gives you the click counter, the geographic source, the device, and the revenue generated if the click leads to a sale.

items.question: Is my data and my models' data private?
items.answer: Yes. All your data (post stats, tracking links, attributed sales) is hosted in France, encrypted at rest and in transit. No data is shared with other agencies or used to train third-party models. You can export everything at any time.

items.question: Why 89€ per month and per model?
items.answer: Because that's the cost of running a service that scrapes Instagram, TikTok, and Twitter every day, that maintains unlimited tracking links, that calculates funnel attribution, and that delivers it all to you in a unified dashboard. Compare that to the scattered tools you used before (a scraper, a tracking tool, a content calendar, a spreadsheet): you pay for a single plan for a more powerful, unified system.
